# terrible_community_general_nictagadm (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the nic tag.

### Optional

- `etherstub` (Boolean) Specifies that the nic tag is attached to a created `etherstub`. Parameter `etherstub` is mutually exclusive with both `mtu`, and `mac`.
- `force` (Boolean) When `state=absent` this switch uses the `-f` parameter and delete the nic tag regardless of existing VMs.
- `mac` (String) Specifies the `mac` address to attach the nic tag to when not creating an `etherstub`. Parameters `mac` and `etherstub` are mutually exclusive.
- `mtu` (Number) Specifies the size of the `mtu` of the desired nic tag. Parameters `mtu` and `etherstub` are mutually exclusive.
- `state` (String) Create or delete a SmartOS nic tag.
